defaultCwd.description: Default cwd for launched workers when --cwd is not given. Useful for Feishu/chat invocations where ctx.cwd is unavailable.

defaultModel.description: Default model to pass as --model to claude at launch time.

tmuxName.description: Fixed tmux session name reused across launches. Default: auto-claude-code

force.description: If true, the watchdog auto-pastes 'keep working' into the worker whenever claude ends a turn mid-task. Default: false.

maxAutoContinues.description: Circuit-breaker: stop force-continuing after this many consecutive pokes without any todo progress. Default: 5.

instant.description: Delivery mode. true (default): stream raw events live via a watcher process (no cron). false: legacy cron + LLM-summary path. Override per launch with --instant / --summary.

sticky.description: If true (default), after /acc launch any plain message from that same chat is auto-forwarded into the worker — no /acc prefix needed. Set false to disable.

every.description: Watchdog tick interval — e.g. '5m', '30s', '2h', or a raw cron. Default: 5m

interval.description: [deprecated] alias for 'every'. Still accepts a cron expression.

nudgeAfterSec.description: Session-jsonl staleness (seconds) before a gentle nudge. Default: 600

recoverAfterSec.description: Session-jsonl staleness (seconds) before a recovery poke. Default: 1800

broker.description: harness-broker connection. Required only when /acc launch uses --plugin or --pool.

url.description: Broker base URL (default: http://100.106.133.58:7778, jcl Tailscale).

token.description: Bearer token for the broker. Optional today; required once broker enforces auth.

owner.description: Override the audit owner string sent on acquire. Defaults to chat:<senderId> or cli:<USER>.

claudePluginsDir.description: Where to look up <name>/.claude-plugin/harness.json for /acc launch --plugin. Default: ~/.claude/plugins
